references.xbuild:
This is the xbuild references.
XBUILD REFERENCE 1
This is the first version of xbuild. Is based on Dromi GUI core and Dromi uses functionallyon x-build.
XBUILD REFERENCE 2
This x-build not is part of Dromi GUI's, but uses by Dromi.
XBUILD REFERENCE 3
This is a disclaimer for x-build.
